inputs.label: Rebar Diameter (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Standard rebar diameter in millimeters, used to auto‑calculate weight per meter if custom weight is not provided.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard rebar diameter in millimeters, used to auto‑calculate weight per meter if custom weight is not provided.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Milimetre cinsinden standart inşaat demiri çapı; özel ağırlık sağlanmazsa metre başına ağırlığı otomatik hesaplamak için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Length per Bar (m)
inputs.businessContext: Typical standard factory bar length before any laps or cuts.

businessContext_i18n.en: Typical standard factory bar length before any laps or cuts.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Herhangi bir bindirme veya kesimden önce tipik standart fabrika çubuk uzunluğu.

inputs.label: Number of Bars
inputs.businessContext: Total quantity of bars required for the project.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total quantity of bars required for the project.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Proje için gereken toplam çubuk miktarı.

inputs.label: Lap Length (m)
inputs.businessContext: Additional splicing length added per bar for overlap joints.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional splicing length added per bar for overlap joints.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bindirmeli ek yerleri için çubuk başına eklenen ek birleştirme uzunluğu.

inputs.label: Wastage (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage overage for cutting waste, bending loss and site damage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage overage for cutting waste, bending loss and site damage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesim atığı, bükme kaybı ve saha hasarı için yüzde fazlalık.

inputs.label: Custom Weight per Meter (kg/m)
inputs.businessContext: Optional override for the theoretical weight; if 0 or blank, weight is calculated from diameter using the formula 0.006165 × d².

businessContext_i18n.en: Optional override for the theoretical weight; if 0 or blank, weight is calculated from diameter using the formula 0.006165 × d².
businessContext_i18n.tr: Teorik ağırlık için isteğe bağlı geçersiz kılma; 0 veya boş ise ağırlık, 0.006165 × d² formülü kullanılarak çaptan hesaplanır.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
